scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run python scripts/run_api.py
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:api && npm run type-check:web
scripts.type-check:api: cd apps/api && uv run pyright core/ agents/ api/ tools/
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.test:api: cd apps/api && uv run pytest tests/
scripts.lint: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:web
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/api && uv run ruff check .
